title: Xtra Roasted Portuguese Cottage Cheese Curry
description: A roasted and shaggy Portuguese dish featuring cottage cheese, this curry is perfect for a monsoon day. It is also FODMAP friendly.

ingredients.name: cottage cheese
ingredients.notes: paneer or ricotta can be used as substitutes

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together the cottage cheese, chopped onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
In a pan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tomato puree and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the roasted cottage cheese mixture, coconut milk, salt, and pepper to the pan.
Stir well and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
